'''Fambaa sonic cannons''' were heavy military weapons deployed by [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]]. They were named after the [[Fambaa/Legends|fambaa]], large creatures indigenous to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. The cannons moved under their own power, folded up into a compact snail-like shape. Deployed on the battlefield, they unfolded to reveal dozens of high-yield [[Booma/Legends|boomas]], which it hurled with its immense biomechanical power into enemy fortresses.

{{Weapon-stub}}
